title: PagerDuty on-call coverage
description: One record per escalation policy: the policy's identity, the escalation tiers it defines, and WHO is currently on call at each tier (the on-call IDENTITY needed to prove coverage — assignee opaque user id + display name). Pulled read-only from the PagerDuty REST API (escalation policies + on-call endpoints). Coverage FACTS + on-call identity only — never a responder's personal phone number, personal email, or other personal contact detail, and never incident free-text. Proves an incident-response capability exists and is staffed (SOC 2 CC7.4; SCF IRO-04 Incident Response Plan — staffed on-call coverage proves the IR plan is operational; the incident-response-team concept SCF labels IRO-07 is absent from the bundled catalog fixture, so IRO-04 carries the hint). The connector reports a descriptive coverage posture; the platform evaluator owns the final pass/fail per (control, scope). x-default-scf-anchors are default mapping hints flagged for maintainer recheck (OQ #9); IRO-07 absent → IRO-04 used (see slice 654 decisions-log D2).

escalation_policy_id.description: PagerDuty-native stable identifier of the escalation policy (an opaque ID, not a credential).

escalation_policy_name.description: Human-readable name of the escalation policy.

num_tiers.description: Number of escalation tiers (rules) defined on the policy. A coverage fact, not a credential.

covered.description: Whether at least one tier currently has an on-call assignee (the coverage posture for this policy).

tiers.description: The escalation tiers in order, each with the on-call identities responsible at that tier. Identity (id + display name) only — never personal contact details.

on_call.description: On-call assignees at this tier — the identity needed to prove coverage. NEVER personal phone/personal email.

assignee_kind.description: Whether the tier escalates to a specific user or to an on-call schedule.

assignee_id.description: PagerDuty-native opaque id of the on-call user or schedule (not a credential).

assignee_name.description: Display name of the on-call user or schedule. The IDENTITY needed to prove coverage — never a personal phone number or personal email address.
